source_list_entries.title: Identity and Ethics
author: David Shoemaker
source_list_entries.notes: SEP source covering Parfit-style links between personal identity and normative ethics.

source_list_entries.title: Identity and Ethics
author: David Shoemaker
source_list_entries.notes: SEP pilot for Phase 1 reingestion. Run this first under the frozen stage-model profile.

source_list_entries.title: Physicalism
author: Daniel Stoljar
source_list_entries.notes: SEP entry on physicalism — covers deflationary and eliminativist responses to qualia arguments. Essential materialist counterpoint to Chalmers/Nagel. Replaces Dennett 'Quining Qualia' (Tufts link now dead/redirects to homepage).

primary_local_artifact.title: Famine, Affluence and Morality, by Peter Singer
author: Peter Singer

local_artifacts.title: Famine, Affluence and Morality, by Peter Singer
author: Peter Singer

source_list_entries.title: Jerry Fodor
author: Internet Encyclopedia of Philosophy
source_list_entries.notes: Fodor's computational theory of mind and representational commitments.

source_list_entries.title: Qualia
author: Michael Tye
source_list_entries.notes: SEP entry on qualia — covers the knowledge argument (Mary's Room / Jackson), inverted qualia, absent qualia, and major responses. Replaces direct paper URL for Jackson which was JSTOR-blocked.

source_list_entries.title: The Turing Test
author: Graham Oppy
David Dowe
source_list_entries.notes: SEP entry on the Turing Test — covers Turing's original proposal, objections (Searle, Lady Lovelace, etc.), and contemporary debates about machine intelligence and consciousness. Replaces Chalmers arXiv 2303.07103 which only has a 560-word abstract page available.

source_list_entries.title: Locke on Personal Identity
author: William Uzgalis
source_list_entries.notes: Lockean memory criterion context for personal identity debates.

source_list_entries.title: Content Externalism
author: Jessica Brown
Mikkel Gerken
source_list_entries.notes: SEP source on externalist approaches relevant to extended-cognition framing.

source_list_entries.title: Consciousness
author: Robert Van Gulick
source_list_entries.notes: SEP overview — covers phenomenal vs access consciousness, the hard problem, and major positions.

source_list_entries.title: Descartes' Epistemology
author: Richard Francks
source_list_entries.notes: Descartes background for substance dualism and mind-body framing.

source_list_entries.title: Mental Causation
author: Katalin Farkas
source_list_entries.notes: Core source for Kim-style exclusion worries and non-reductive physicalism debates.

source_list_entries.title: Functionalism
author: Janet Levin
source_list_entries.notes: SEP entry on functionalism — covers multiple realisability, machine functionalism, and objections. Bridge to AI minds.

source_list_entries.title: Philosophy of Artificial Intelligence
author: Selmer Bringsjord
Naveen Govindarajulu
source_list_entries.notes: SEP entry covering machine consciousness, strong AI, symbol grounding, and current debates.

source_list_entries.title: Computing Machinery and Intelligence
author: Alan Turing
source_list_entries.notes: The Turing Test paper. UMBC hosted HTML version — verified accessible.

source_list_entries.title: Consciousness
author: Internet Encyclopedia of Philosophy
source_list_entries.notes: IEP entry on consciousness — covers Nagel's subjective character argument, the hard problem, phenomenal vs access consciousness, and major positions. SEP Nagel entry is 'Not Yet Available'.

source_list_entries.title: The Chinese Room Argument
author: David Cole
source_list_entries.notes: SEP entry on the Chinese Room — covers Searle's original 1980 argument, all major objections (systems reply, robot reply, brain simulator reply) and responses. Replaces direct Cambridge URL for Searle 1980 which is login-gated despite claiming open-access.

source_list_entries.title: Mind Identity Theory
author: Paul M. Churchland
source_list_entries.notes: Covers Smart-style identity theory and major objections.
